What We Clean
Professional Services
Every surface treated with the right method — soft wash for delicate surfaces, high-pressure for tough grime.
🏠
House Washing
Gentle soft-wash removes algae, mold, mildew, and oxidation from vinyl, brick, stucco, and cedar siding without damaging your home.
Soft Wash
🛣️
Driveway & Pavers
High-pressure cleaning for cement driveways, sidewalks, and paver patios. We remove stains, moss, and years of built-up grime.
Pressure Wash
🪵
Deck & Patio
Restore composite and wood decks to like-new condition. We clean away green algae, black staining, and weathered grime safely.
Soft + Pressure
🏚️
Roof Washing
Low-pressure soft wash safely eliminates black streaks, moss, and lichen from shingles, metal, terracotta, and wood shake roofs.
Soft Wash Only
🔒
Fencing
Vinyl, wood, and wrought iron fencing cleaned and restored. Remove green algae and weathering from both sides.
All Materials
✨
Add-On Services
Gutter cleaning, outdoor furniture, and awning cleaning available as add-ons to any service. Bundle and save.
Bundle & Save

Why Choose Us
20 Years of Trusted Experience
With 20 years of hands-on experience in the industry, Tidal Wash was built on one principle: professional results with zero hassle.
📋

Self-Quote in Seconds

Use our online estimator to get an instant price — no waiting for callbacks, no sales pressure.

📅

Book Your Own Appointment

Pick a date and time that works for you. We'll confirm and be there. No phone tag required.

🌊

Right Method for Every Surface

Soft wash for roofs and siding, high-pressure for concrete and pavers. We never damage what we clean.

🛡️

Estimate Transparency

If we spot anything that changes your quote, we contact you first — no surprises on billing day.

Instant Pricing

Where We Work
Our Service Area

We serve the entire Delaware Valley corridor from Dover, Delaware up through the Philadelphia suburbs to Media, Pennsylvania. If you're not sure whether we cover your area, just give us a call.
